cases.description: Tier-1 source should win adjudication over tier-3 source even if both describe same dispute.

articles.title: Riverton checkpoint blast kills 12, officials say
articles.description: Authorities in Riverton said 12 people were killed in the checkpoint blast.

articles.title: Riverton explosion death toll reported at 21
articles.description: A local blog post says 21 died in the same Riverton checkpoint explosion.

cases.description: When trust tiers are equal, the newer article should win adjudication.

articles.title: Port district clash leaves 19 injured
articles.description: Metro Times reports 19 injuries in the port district clash in Lydon City.

articles.title: Lydon port clash injures 11, local responders say
articles.description: Global Ledger says 11 were injured in the same Lydon City port district incident.

cases.description: Equal tier and equal timestamp should remain unresolved.

articles.title: Northern crossing blast kills 8
articles.description: Reuters reports 8 fatalities in the northern crossing explosion in Belmar.

articles.title: Belmar crossing explosion leaves 10 dead
articles.description: Associated Press reports 10 deaths in the same Belmar northern crossing blast.
